===Pokémon Journeys===
[[File:Team Rocket Trio JNM.png|thumb|right|200px|Jessie in the {{ma|Pokémon Journeys}}]]
Jessie debuted in ''[[JNM04|Flash of the Titans!]]''. In the manga, the role of the Team Rocket trio is quite reduced compared to the animated series, so their participation ends up being removed or much smaller than the episodes on which each chapter is based.
